title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: rhc bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for rhc is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description: For detailed information on changes in this release, see the Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10 Release Notes linked from the References section.
affected_products: Red Hat Enterprise Linux for ARM 64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for IBM z Systems
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for x86_64 10 x86_64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for Power, little endian

fixes.description: rhc should return non zero exit code when invalid options used.
rhc connect throws error with activation key and org when --format json is used
[rhc] The rhc connect should return non-zero exit codes, when wrong CLI option is provided
rhc status command fails to detect insights status on a new disconnected system
[rhc] The "rhc status" should work gracefully, when some error happens

full_text:
An update for rhc is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

For detailed information on changes in this release, see the Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10 Release Notes linked from the References section.
